title: Oil price rises as markets question durability of Middle East ceasefire
summary_full: Gas prices also increase, while global stock markets slip back after strong rally on WednesdayBusiness live – latest updatesMiddle East crisis – live updatesOil and gas prices rose on Thursday and Asian stock markets retreated as the two-week ceasefire in Iran looked increasingly shaky, with Israel continuing attacks on Lebanon and the US and Iran threatening a return to military action.A day after the US and Iran announced an 11th-hour ceasefire, including an agreement to reopen the strait of Hormuz, many questions remain and there were signs that the truce was already being broken, causing jitters in the markets.
